question: Signup ke time password kaise hash hota hai?

Access token kitne time ke liye valid hai, aur yeh config kahan set hai?
Refresh token flow kaise kaam karta hai?
Invalid/expired token par kya error response milta hai?
GitHub se repository clone kaise hoti hai?
Agar repository pehle se clone ho chuki ho to dobara clone hoti hai kya?
Scan ke time kaunsi directories ignore hoti hain (jaise node_modules, .git, etc.)?
Binary files kaise detect hoti hain?
Virtualenv folder kaise pehchana jaata hai jab naam fixed nahi hota?
Indexing ke time sirf Python files process hoti hain ya baaki languages bhi?
Embedding generate karne se pehle cache check hota hai kya?

Redis cache key ek query text se kaise banti hai?
MongoDB mein vector search kaise implement ki gayi hai?
Agar context mein answer na mile to chat endpoint kya response deta hai?
LLM provider (Groq vs Gemini) kaise select hota hai?
Agent LLM-supplied file path se directory traversal (../../etc/passwd) se kaise bachta hai?
Final answer dene se pehle agent maximum kitni baar tool call kar sakta hai?
git_blame tool kisi line ka author kaise nikalta hai?
